# Legacy Monolithic Skills (Archived)

These files are the **original monolithic role-based SKILL files** that were decomposed into 24 atomic skills in the `refactor/mcem-pipeline-prompt-optimizations` branch.

They are preserved here for reference only. **Do not load these as active skills** — they have been superseded by the atomic skills in the parent directory.

## Mapping

| Legacy File | Replaced By (current skills) |
|---|---|
| `CSAM_SKILL.md` | `milestone-health-review`, `delivery-accountability-mapping`, `se-execution-check`, `commit-gate-enforcement`, `stage-5-review` |
| `Cloud_Solution_Architect_SKILL.md` | `architecture-review`, `commit-gate-enforcement`, `se-execution-check`, `mcem-flow` (non-linear progression) |
| `Solution_Engineer_SKILL.md` | `proof-plan-orchestration`, `se-execution-check`, `mcem-diagnostics`, `milestone-health-review`, `handoff-readiness-validation` |
| `Specialist_SKILL.md` | `pipeline-qualification`, `pipeline-hygiene-triage`, `risk-surfacing`, `mcem-flow` (role orchestration), `shared-patterns` (partner motion), `handoff-readiness-validation` |

See `.github/documents/SPEC-skill-restructure.md` for the full migration specification.
